configurations.name: html
runtimeArgs: const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const dir='/Users/rami/Desktop/Lana Ai Website/html';const port=process.env.PORT||4178;const t={'.html':'text/html; charset=utf-8','.js':'text/javascript','.jpg':'image/jpeg','.css':'text/css','.svg':'image/svg+xml'};http.createServer((req,res)=>{let p=decodeURIComponent((req.url||'/').split('?')[0]);if(p==='/')p='/index.html';const f=path.join(dir,p);fs.readFile(f,(e,d)=>{if(e){res.writeHead(404);res.end('Not found');return;}res.writeHead(200,{'content-type':t[path.extname(f)]||'application/octet-stream'});res.end(d);});}).listen(port,()=>console.log('serving '+dir+' on '+port));
